summary: Transfer Management feature fully tested. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Transfers tab with full CRUD functionality working correctly - Add, Edit, Delete, Search/Filter all verified via Playwright automation.

transfers_tab.tab_navigation: WORKING - Transfers Management tab clickable and shows content
transfers_tab.display_cards: WORKING - Shows all 5 seeded transfers in card layout with correct data
transfers_tab.transfer_types: WORKING - Color coded badges (Private=teal, Shared=blue, Luxury=amber)

add_transfer.modal: WORKING - Opens with all fields: Title, From/To Location, City, Price, Transfer Type dropdown, Duration, Confirmation, Description, Available checkbox
add_transfer.create_button: WORKING - Creates new transfer and updates stats count
add_transfer.validation: Form accepts and saves all field values correctly

edit_transfer.modal: WORKING - Opens with pre-populated data from selected transfer
edit_transfer.save_changes_button: WORKING - Updates transfer and persists changes
edit_transfer.hover_edit_icon: WORKING - Edit button appears on hover over card

delete_transfer.delete_action: WORKING - Removes transfer and updates stats count
delete_transfer.hover_delete_icon: WORKING - Delete button appears on hover over card

search_filter.by_title: WORKING - Searching 'Luxury' shows only Luxury Transfer
search_filter.by_city: WORKING - Searching 'Tbilisi' shows only Tbilisi transfer
search_filter.by_location: WORKING - Frontend filters by title, city, or from_location

backend_api.GET_transfers: WORKING - Returns transfers array with success flag
backend_api.GET_transfers_with_filters: WORKING - city and search query params work
backend_api.GET_transfer_by_id: WORKING - Returns single transfer, 404 for invalid ID
backend_api.POST_transfers: WORKING - Creates new transfer with all fields
backend_api.PUT_transfers: WORKING - Updates transfer, 404 for invalid ID
backend_api.DELETE_transfers: WORKING - Deletes transfer, 404 for invalid ID

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - React hydration warning in Proposals table rendering (cosmetic, does not affect functionality)
seed_data_creation: 5 transfers seeded on startup. TEST_ prefixed transfers created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transfer Management feature fully working. Stats: 1543 airports, 28 cities, 2 hotels, 5 transfers. Login via admin@test.com / admin123. Admin dashboard accessed via 'Backend Admin Dashboard' link in footer (scroll down on Dashboard). Transfers tab shows cards with type badges and hover-reveal edit/delete buttons.
mocked_apis_note: All transfer APIs are real CRUD operations - no mocking. Flight search, PayPal and Google Sheets remain MOCKED.
